Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**
   Preservation Of Exponentials Along Weak Equivalences

   In this file, we show that an arbitrary weak equivalence F : C -> D preserves exponential objects.

   Contents
   1. The image of an exponent is again an exponent [weak_equiv_preserves_exponential_objects]
   2. The codomain has exponentials [weak_equiv_into_univ_creates_exponentials]
   3. A weak equivalence preserves all exponentials [weak_equiv_preserves_exponentials']
 *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monics.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Terminal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Preservation.Binproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.Creation.BinProducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.WeakEquivalences.LiftPreservation.BinProducts.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Adjunctions.Coreflections.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Exponentials.

Local Open Scope cat.

(** * 1.  Weak equivalences preserve exponential objects [weak_equiv_preserves_exponential_objects] *)
Section WeakEquivalencesPreserveExponentialObjects.

  Context {C₀ C₁ : category}
    {F : functor C₀ C₁} (F_weq : is_weak_equiv F)
    (C₁_univ : is_univalent C₁)
    {P₀ : BinProducts C₀}
    (E₀ : Exponentials P₀).

  Context (P₁ : BinProducts C₁).

  Context {x₀ y₀ : C₀}
    {a₁ : C₁}
    (f₁ : C₁⟦P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀⟧)
    {a₀ : C₀}
    (i₀ : z_iso (F a₀) a₁).

  Let e₀ := exp (E₀ x₀) y₀.
  Let ev₀ := exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀.

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
preserves_binproduct F

    exact (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq).
  Defined.

  Let f₀ : C₀⟦P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀⟧ := fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) _ _ (i_p · f₁).
  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
# F f₀ = i_p · f₁

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
# F f₀ = i_p · f₁

    apply functor_on_fully_faithful_inv_hom.
  Qed.
  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
z_iso_inv i_p · # F f₀ = f₁

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
z_iso_inv i_p · # F f₀ = f₁

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
z_iso_inv i_p · (i_p · f₁) = f₁

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
z_iso_inv i_p · i_p · f₁ = f₁

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
identity (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · f₁ = f₁

    apply id_left.
  Qed.

  Definition weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map
    : C₁ ⟦a₁, F e₀⟧ := z_iso_inv i₀ · #F (exp_lam _ f₀).

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
z_iso_inv i_p
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map)

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
z_iso_inv i_p
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
z_iso_inv i_p
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) =
?b
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
?b =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map)
 
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
z_iso_inv i_p
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) =
?b

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
z_iso_inv
  (z_iso_comp
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
     (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
        (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) =
?b

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ a₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀)
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity (F x₀))
                  i₀ · f₁)))) = ?b

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
   · # F
       (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
          (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀)
          (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
             (invmap
                (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                   (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
                (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                   (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                   (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                 · BinProductOfArrows C₁
                     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                     (identity (F x₀)) i₀ · f₁))))) =
?b

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀)
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity (F x₀))
                  i₀ · f₁)))) = ?t2

      apply (preserves_binproduct_of_arrows (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)).
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀))
     (# F
        (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
           (invmap
              (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                 (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
              (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                 (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                 (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
               · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                   (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                   (identity (F x₀)) i₀ · f₁))))
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· BinProductOfArrows C₁
    (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
    (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀))
    (# F
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity (F x₀))
                  i₀ · f₁))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀))
  (inv_from_z_iso i₀
   · # F
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity (F x₀))
                  i₀ · f₁))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀))
  (inv_from_z_iso i₀
   · # F
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity (F x₀))
                  i₀ · f₁))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))) = ?b
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
?b =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map)
 
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀))
  (inv_from_z_iso i₀
   · # F
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity (F x₀))
                  i₀ · f₁))))
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))) = ?b

      apply (precompWithBinProductArrow _  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))).
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
     (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀))
     (inv_from_z_iso i₀
      · # F
          (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
             (invmap
                (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                   (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
                (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                   (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                   (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                 · BinProductOfArrows C₁
                     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                     (identity (F x₀)) i₀ · f₁))))
   · BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
     (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀))
     (inv_from_z_iso i₀
      · # F
          (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
             (invmap
                (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                   (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
                (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                   (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                   (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                 · BinProductOfArrows C₁
                     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                     (identity (F x₀)) i₀ · f₁))))
   · BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀))
  (inv_from_z_iso i₀
   · # F
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity (F x₀))
                  i₀ · f₁))))
· BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))) =
BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀)
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀))
  (inv_from_z_iso i₀
   · # F
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful 
                (pr2 F_weq) 
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ 
                (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
                  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) 
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
                  (identity (F x₀)) i₀ · f₁))))
· BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))) =
BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
· weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀))
  (inv_from_z_iso i₀
   · # F
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity (F x₀))
                  i₀ · f₁))))
· BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))) =
BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀)

F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀))
  (inv_from_z_iso i₀
   · # F
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity (F x₀))
                  i₀ · f₁))))
· BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))) =
?b

F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁

ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧

  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
?b = BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀)
 
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀))
  (inv_from_z_iso i₀
   · # F
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity (F x₀))
                  i₀ · f₁))))
· BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))) =
?b
 apply BinProductOfArrowsPr1. 
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
· (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀)) =
BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀)

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
· (identity (F x₀) · identity (F x₀)) =
BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀)

      now rewrite id_right.
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀) · # F (identity x₀))
  (inv_from_z_iso i₀
   · # F
       (exp_lam (E₀ x₀)
          (invmap
             (weq_from_fully_faithful (pr2 F_weq)
                (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀)
             (BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
                (# F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
                (# F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
              · BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity (F x₀))
                  i₀ · f₁))))
· BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))) =
BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
· weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map
 apply BinProductOfArrowsPr2.
   Qed.

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))
  weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀)

x₀, y₀: C₀

ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧

  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))
  weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀)

ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧

  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))

     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
f₁ = ?b
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))
  weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · 
   # F ev₀)

F: C₀ ⟶ C₁

C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))
  weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
?y =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))
  weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))
  weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) = ?y

      apply precompWithBinProductArrow.
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
f₁ =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))
     weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map
   · BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))
     weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map
   · BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀


    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
f₁ =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map)
· # F ev₀


    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
t:= exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀: BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) 
  (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀) · 
exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀
f₁ =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map)
· # F ev₀

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
t:= exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀: BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) 
  (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀) · 
exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀
f₁ =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · (z_iso_inv i₀ · # F (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)))
· # F ev₀

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
t:= exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀: BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) 
  (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀) · 
exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀
f₁ =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · z_iso_inv i₀
   · # F (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) · # F ev₀


    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
t:= exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀: BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) 
  (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀) · 
exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀
z_iso_inv i_p · # F f₀ =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · z_iso_inv i₀
   · # F (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) · # F ev₀


    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
t:= exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀: BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) 
  (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀) · 
exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀
z_iso_inv i_p · # F f₀ = ?b
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
t:= exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀: BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) 
  (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀) · 
exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀
?b =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · z_iso_inv i₀
   · # F (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) · 
# F ev₀

x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
t:= exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀: BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) 
  (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀) · 
exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀
z_iso_inv i_p · # F f₀ = ?b

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
t:= exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀: BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) 
  (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀) · 
exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀
f₀ = ?t2

      exact (! exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀).
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
t:= exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀: BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) 
  (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀) · 
exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀
z_iso_inv i_p
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)
     · exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · z_iso_inv i₀
   · # F (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) · # F ev₀

exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀

· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀))

  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · z_iso_inv i₀
   · # F (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) · # F ev₀

ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
t:= exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀: BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) 
  (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀) · 
exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀
z_iso_inv i_p
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · z_iso_inv i₀
   · # F (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
t:= exp_beta (E₀ x₀) f₀: BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) 
  (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀) · 
exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀ = f₀
z_iso_inv i_p
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
   · (z_iso_inv i₀ · # F (exp_lam (E₀ x₀) f₀)))

    apply commutation_of_binproductarrows.
  Qed.

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
   f₁ =
   BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
   · (BinProductArrow C₁
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P₀ x₀ e₀))
        (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
      · # F ev₀))

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
   f₁ =
   BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
   · (BinProductArrow C₁
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P₀ x₀ e₀))
        (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
      · # F ev₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
isProofIrrelevant
  (∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
   f₁ =
   BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
   · (BinProductArrow C₁
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P₀ x₀ e₀))
        (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
      · # F ev₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ϕ₁ = ϕ₂


    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
isPredicate
  (λ x : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
   f₁ =
   BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) x
   · (BinProductArrow C₁
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P₀ x₀ e₀))
        (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
      · # F ev₀))
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
pr1 ϕ₁ = pr1 ϕ₂

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
isPredicate
  (λ x : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
   f₁ =
   BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) x
   · (BinProductArrow C₁
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P₀ x₀ e₀))
        (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
      · # F ev₀))
 intro ; apply homset_property. 
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
pr1 ϕ₁ = pr1 ϕ₂

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁ = i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂


    (* F a₀ → F e₀ *)
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
weq_from_fully_faithful (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq)
  a₀ e₀
  (invmap
     (weq_from_fully_faithful
        (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
     (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁)) = i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
weq_from_fully_faithful (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq)
  a₀ e₀
  (invmap
     (weq_from_fully_faithful
        (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
     (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁)) =
weq_from_fully_faithful (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq)
  a₀ e₀
  (invmap
     (weq_from_fully_faithful
        (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
     (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂))


    (* a₀ → e₀ *)
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀) (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁) =
invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀) (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₁ =
invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀) (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
