  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₁ = ψ₂


    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
ψ₁ = ψ₂

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
(λ g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
 (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
  :
  C₀
  ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
      (coreflection_data_object
         (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
 · make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
     (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ψ₁
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
(λ g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
 (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
  :
  C₀
  ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
      (coreflection_data_object
         (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
 · make_coreflection_data 
     (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ψ₂

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
(λ g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
 (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
  :
  C₀
  ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
      (coreflection_data_object
         (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
 · make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
     (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ψ₁

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) (pr11 t)
· make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
    (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) ψ₁
· make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
    (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
pr11 t = ψ₁

      apply exp_lam_app.
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
(λ g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
 (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
  :
  C₀
  ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
      (coreflection_data_object
         (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
 · make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
     (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ψ₂


    (* P₀ x₀ a₀ → y₀ *)
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
# F (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
# F
  (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) ψ₂
   · make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
       (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
# F (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
# F (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) ψ₂)
· # F
    (make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
       (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
# F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
# F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) ψ₂)
· # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)

    (* F (P₀ x₀ a₀) → F y₀ *)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
C₁
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)

  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
z_iso ?w
  (F
     (BinProduct_of_functors_ob C₀ C₀ P₀
        (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀)
        (functor_identity C₀) a₀))
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
?g · # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
?g
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)) 
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) ψ₂)
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
C₁
 exact (P₁ (F x₀) a₁).

(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
  (F
     (BinProduct_of_functors_ob C₀ C₀ P₀
        (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀)
        (functor_identity C₀) a₀))

ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧

· (BinProductArrow C₁

  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data

(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :

     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
?g · # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
?g
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)) 
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) ψ₂)
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
  (F
     (BinProduct_of_functors_ob C₀ C₀ P₀
        (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀)
        (functor_identity C₀) a₀))

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F
     (BinProduct_of_functors_ob C₀ C₀ P₀
        (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀)
        (functor_identity C₀) a₀))

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
z_iso
  (F
     (BinProduct_of_functors_ob C₀ C₀ P₀
        (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀)
        (functor_identity C₀) a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))

      apply (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso _ (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ _ _)).
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
z_iso_comp
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity_z_iso (F x₀))
     (z_iso_inv i₀))
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))))
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
z_iso_comp
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity_z_iso (F x₀))
     (z_iso_inv i₀))
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))))
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) ψ₂)
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p:= ! pr2 ϕ₁ @ pr2 ϕ₂: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
z_iso_comp
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity_z_iso (F x₀))
     (z_iso_inv i₀))
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))))
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
z_iso_comp
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity_z_iso (F x₀))
     (z_iso_inv i₀))
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))))
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) ψ₂)
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
z_iso_comp
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity_z_iso (F x₀))
     (z_iso_inv i₀))
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))))
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
z_iso_comp
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (identity_z_iso (F x₀))
     (z_iso_inv i₀))
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))))
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) ψ₂)
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ a₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀

f₁ =

· (BinProductArrow C₁

  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧

       ⟦ coreflection_data_object

       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))

· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))

· # F ev₀

  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)

    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · 
# F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)

    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)) 
        (P₀ x₀ a₀) (identity x₀) ψ₂)
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧

  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))

   · # F ev₀)

  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧

  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧

  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)

  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)

· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F

    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (inv_from_z_iso i₀)

BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)

    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀

F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ a₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) = ?b
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · 
# F ev₀
 
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ a₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) = ?b

        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ a₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))) = ?y'

        apply (precompWithBinProductArrow _   (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P₀ _ _))).
      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀ a₀)
        (functor_identity C₀ a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))
     (inv_from_z_iso i₀)
   · BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))
     (inv_from_z_iso i₀)
   · BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀ a₀)
        (functor_identity C₀ a₀)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀ a₀)
        (functor_identity C₀ a₀)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) = ?b
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧

  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F

     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)

  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧

  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · 
# F ev₀

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
?b =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀

        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
