  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
?y =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))

        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) = ?y

        apply (precompWithBinProductArrow _   (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀))).
      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀ a₀)
        (functor_identity C₀ a₀)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (pr1 ϕ₁)
   · BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) (pr1 ϕ₁)
   · BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀

F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀

x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧

  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀ a₀)
        (functor_identity C₀ a₀)))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁) · # F ev₀

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁) · # F ev₀


      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) = ?b
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
?b =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁) · 
# F ev₀
 
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) = ?b

        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
# F (exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁) = ?t2

        exact (maponpaths #F (pr21 t)).
      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F
    (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) (pr11 t)
     · make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
         (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁) · # F ev₀

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· (# F (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) (pr11 t))
   · # F
       (make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
          (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁) · # F ev₀

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) (pr11 t))
· # F
    (make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
       (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁) · # F ev₀

F: C₀ ⟶ C₁

x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁

     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))

ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))

· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F

  (weq_from_fully_faithful

t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)

    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))

· # F ev₀

  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) (pr11 t)) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁)

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧

  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))

  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
pr11 t = ψ₁
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F

P₀: BinProducts C₀

x₀, y₀: C₀

       ⟦ coreflection_data_object

       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)

  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)

    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))

· # F ev₀ =

  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))

· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F

       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
pf: pr11 t = ψ₁
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) (pr11 t)) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁)

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
pr11 t = ψ₁

        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
ψ₁ = pr11 t

        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
(λ g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
 (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
  :
  C₀
  ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
      (coreflection_data_object
         (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
 # (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
 · make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
     (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ψ₁

        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁ =
BinProduct_of_functors_mor C₀ C₀ P₀
  (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀) (functor_identity C₀) a₀
  (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) ψ₁ · exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀

        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)

  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) (pr11 t)
· make_coreflection_data (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀)
    (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀) =
BinProduct_of_functors_mor C₀ C₀ P₀
  (constant_functor C₀ C₀ x₀) (functor_identity C₀) a₀
  (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) ψ₁ · exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀

        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
pr11 t = ψ₁

        apply exp_lam_app.
      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
pf: pr11 t = ψ₁
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) (pr11 t)) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁)


      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧

  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
pf: pr11 t = ψ₁
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁)


      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
pf: pr11 t = ψ₁
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₁: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₁)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁)

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
pf: pr11 t = ψ₁
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₁: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₁)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₁)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₁)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₁) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₁)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁)

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
pf: pr11 t = ψ₁
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₁: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₁)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₁)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₁)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₁) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₁)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) ψ₁) = ?b
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
pf: pr11 t = ψ₁
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₁: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₁)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₁)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₁)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₁) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₁)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
?b =
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · pr1 ϕ₁)
 
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
pf: pr11 t = ψ₁
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₁: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₁) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₁)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₁)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₁)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₁) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₁)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
