  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₂: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₂)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₂)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
?b = BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
 
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₂: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₂)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₂)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
      · identity (F x₀))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
      · inv_from_z_iso i₀) · # F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
  (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
      · identity (F x₀))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
      · inv_from_z_iso i₀) · # F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
· BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) · i₀ = ?b

          
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₂: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₂)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₂)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductArrow C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
      · identity (F x₀))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
      · inv_from_z_iso i₀) · # F (pr121 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
  (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ a₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
      · identity (F x₀))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
      · inv_from_z_iso i₀) · # F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)))
· BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) = ?y'

          apply BinProductPr2Commutes.
        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₂: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₂)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₂)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)) · i₀ =
BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)


        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₂: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₂)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₂)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)) · i₀ = ?b
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₂: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₂)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₂)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
?b = BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
 
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₂: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₂)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₂)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)) · i₀ = ?b

          
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₂: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₂)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₂)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductArrow C₁
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀))
  (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity (F x₀))
  (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀)
· # F (pr221 (P₀ x₀ a₀)) = ?y'

          apply (BinProductPr2Commutes _ _ _   (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) (P₀ x₀ a₀))).
        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₂: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₂)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₂)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · inv_from_z_iso i₀
· i₀ = BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₂: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₂)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₂)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
· (inv_from_z_iso i₀ · i₀) =
BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

        
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
ϕ₁, ϕ₂: ∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
   · # F ev₀)
ψ₁:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₁): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
ψ₂:= invmap
  (weq_from_fully_faithful
     (ff_from_weak_equiv F F_weq) a₀ e₀)
  (i₀ · pr1 ϕ₂): C₀ ⟦ a₀, e₀ ⟧
t:= is_exponentiable_to_uvp P₀ 
  (E₀ x₀) y₀ (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁): ∃! g : C₀
       ⟦ coreflection_data_object
           (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁),
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data 
            (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) 
            (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)) ⟧,
(a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁
 :
 C₀
 ⟦ constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀
     (coreflection_data_object
        (a₀,, exp_app (E₀ x₀) ψ₁)), y₀ ⟧) =
# (constprod_functor1 P₀ x₀) g
· make_coreflection_data 
    (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀) (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)
p: BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₁)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) 
  (pr1 ϕ₂)
· BinProductArrow C₁
    (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀))
    (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
    (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
· # F ev₀
t':= preserves_binproduct_of_arrows
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (identity x₀) ψ₂: inv_from_z_iso
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
· # F
    (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
       (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) (# F (identity x₀)) 
  (# F ψ₂)
· inv_from_z_iso
    (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
       (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
       (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
t'':= z_iso_inv_to_left
  (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
  (F (P₀ x₀ e₀))
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
  (# F
     (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
        (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
        (identity x₀) ψ₂)) t': # F
  (BinProductOfArrows C₀ 
     (P₀ x₀ e₀) (P₀ x₀ a₀) 
     (identity x₀) ψ₂) =
preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
· (BinProductOfArrows C₁ 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)) 
     (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)) 
     (# F (identity x₀)) 
     (# F ψ₂)
   · inv_from_z_iso
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
             F_weq) (P₀ x₀ e₀)
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))))
BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) · identity a₁ =
BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)

        apply id_right.
  Qed.

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
∃! f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀)

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
∃! f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
   f₁ =
   BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
   · (BinProductArrow C₁
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P₀ x₀ e₀))
        (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
      · # F ev₀))

F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀

P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧

  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))

     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · 
   # F ev₀)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
isaprop
  (∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
   f₁ =
   BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
   · (BinProductArrow C₁
        (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
           (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
           (P₀ x₀ e₀))
        (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
        (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
      · # F ev₀))
 exact weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_uniqueness. 
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
∑ f' : C₁ ⟦ a₁, F e₀ ⟧,
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀)) f'
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
a₁: C₁
f₁: C₁ ⟦ P₁ (F x₀) a₁, F y₀ ⟧
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) a₁
e₀:= exp (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀
ev₀:= exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀: C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀), y₀ ⟧
i_p:= z_iso_comp
  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
     (P₀ x₀ a₀) (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀)))
  (binproduct_of_z_iso (P₁ (F x₀) (F a₀))
     (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity_z_iso (F x₀)) i₀): z_iso (F (P₀ x₀ a₀)) (P₁ (F x₀) a₁)
f₀:= fully_faithful_inv_hom (pr2 F_weq) 
  (P₀ x₀ a₀) y₀ (i_p · f₁): C₀ ⟦ P₀ x₀ a₀, y₀ ⟧
f₁ =
BinProductOfArrows C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))
  (P₁ (F x₀) a₁) (identity (F x₀))
  weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_map
· (BinProductArrow C₁
     (preserves_binproduct_to_binproduct F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ e₀))
     (BinProductPr1 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀)))
     (BinProductPr2 C₁ (P₁ (F x₀) (F e₀))) · # F ev₀)

    exact weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_eq.
  Defined.

End WeakEquivalencesPreserveExponentialObjects.


C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
preserves_exponential_objects' P₀ P₁
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) E₀


C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
preserves_exponential_objects' P₀ P₁
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) E₀

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
is_exponent_uvp P₁
  (z_iso_inv
     (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
        (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
        (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
        (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
   · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y₀)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀))
∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
                     F_weq) (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
             · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))) ⟧,
f₁ =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀)) g
· make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y₀)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀))
isaprop
  (∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
          coreflection_data_object
            (make_coreflection_data
               (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
               (z_iso_inv
                  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
                        F_weq)
                     (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
                     (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
                · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))) ⟧,
   f₁ =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀)) g
   · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
             (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
             (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
             (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
        · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y₀)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀))
(∑ a : C₀, z_iso (F a) ?b)
→ ∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
         coreflection_data_object
           (make_coreflection_data
              (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
              (z_iso_inv
                 (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                    (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
                       F_weq) 
                    (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
                    (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
               · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))) ⟧,
  f₁ =
  # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀)) g
  · make_coreflection_data 
      (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
      (z_iso_inv
         (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
            (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
            (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
            (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
       · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y₀)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀))
C₁

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y₀)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀))
isaprop
  (∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
          coreflection_data_object
            (make_coreflection_data
               (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
               (z_iso_inv
                  (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                     (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
                        F_weq)
                     (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
                     (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
                · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))) ⟧,
   f₁ =
   # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀)) g
   · make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
       (z_iso_inv
          (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
             (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
             (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
             (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
        · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀)))
 intro ; apply isapropiscontr. 
C₀, C₁: category

F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y₀)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀))
(∑ a : C₀, z_iso (F a) ?b)
→ ∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
         coreflection_data_object
           (make_coreflection_data
              (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
              (z_iso_inv
                 (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                    (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
                       F_weq) (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
                    (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
               · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))) ⟧,
  f₁ =
  # (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀)) g

         (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F

            (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
            (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
       · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))

f₁: coreflection_data (F y₀)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀))
C₁

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y₀)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀))
a₀: C₀
i₀: z_iso (F a₀) ?b
∃! g : C₁ ⟦ coreflection_data_object f₁,
       coreflection_data_object
         (make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
            (z_iso_inv
               (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
                  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts
                     F_weq) (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
                  (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
             · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))) ⟧,
f₁ =
# (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀)) g
· make_coreflection_data (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
    (z_iso_inv
       (preserves_binproduct_to_z_iso F
          (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)
          (P₀ x₀ (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))
          (P₁ (F x₀) (F (exp (E₀ x₀) y₀))))
     · # F (exp_eval (E₀ x₀) y₀))
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₀, y₀: C₀
f₁: coreflection_data (F y₀)
  (constprod_functor1 P₁ (F x₀))
C₁

  exact (weak_equiv_preserves_exponentiable_objects_uvp _ _ _ _ i₀).
Defined.

(** * 2. Weak Equivalences Create Exponentials *)
Section WeakEquivalencesIntoUnivalentCatsCreatesExponentials.

  Context {C₀ C₁ : category}
    {F : functor C₀ C₁} (F_weq : is_weak_equiv F)
    (C₁_univ : is_univalent C₁)
    {P₀ : BinProducts C₀}
    (E₀ : Exponentials P₀)
    (P₁ : BinProducts C₁).

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
Exponentials P₁

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
Exponentials P₁

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
is_exponentiable P₁ x₁

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
is_exponentiable_alt P₁ x₁

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
isaprop (is_exponentiable_alt P₁ x₁)
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
(∑ a : C₀, z_iso (F a) x₁)
→ is_exponentiable_alt P₁ x₁

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
isaprop (is_exponentiable_alt P₁ x₁)

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁, t: C₁
isaprop (Exponent P₁ x₁ t)

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁, t: C₁
is_univalent C₁

      exact C₁_univ.
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
(∑ a : C₀, z_iso (F a) x₁)
→ is_exponentiable_alt P₁ x₁

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
x₀: C₀
ix: z_iso (F x₀) x₁
is_exponentiable_alt P₁ x₁

ix: z_iso (F x₀) x₁
y₁: C₁

ix: z_iso (F x₀) x₁

x₁: C₁
x₀: C₀
ix: z_iso (F x₀) x₁

(∑ a : C₀, z_iso (F a) y₁) → Exponent P₁ (F x₀) y₁

F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁

E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
x₀: C₀
ix: z_iso (F x₀) x₁

isaprop (Exponent P₁ (F x₀) y₁)

      
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁

E₀: Exponentials P₀

x₀: C₀
ix: z_iso (F x₀) x₁
y₁: C₁
is_univalent C₁

      exact C₁_univ.
    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
x₀: C₀
ix: z_iso (F x₀) x₁
y₁: C₁
(∑ a : C₀, z_iso (F a) y₁) → Exponent P₁ (F x₀) y₁

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
x₀: C₀
ix: z_iso (F x₀) x₁
y₁: C₁
y₀: C₀
iy: z_iso (F y₀) y₁
Exponent P₁ (F x₀) y₁

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
x₀: C₀
ix: z_iso (F x₀) x₁
y₁: C₁
y₀: C₀
iy: z_iso (F y₀) y₁
Exponent P₁ (F x₀) (F y₀)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
x₁: C₁
x₀: C₀
ix: z_iso (F x₀) x₁
y₁: C₁
y₀: C₀
iy: z_iso (F y₀) y₁
preserves_exponential_objects' P₀ P₁
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) E₀

    apply (weak_equiv_preserves_exponential_objects F_weq C₁_univ).
  Defined.

End WeakEquivalencesIntoUnivalentCatsCreatesExponentials.

(** * 3. Weak Equivalences Preserve Exponentials *)
Section WeakEquivalencesIntoUnivalentCatsPreservesExponentials.

  Context {C₀ C₁ : category}
    {F : functor C₀ C₁} (F_weq : is_weak_equiv F)
    (C₁_univ : is_univalent C₁)
    {P₀ : BinProducts C₀}
    (E₀ : Exponentials P₀).

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
preserves_exponentials E₀
  (weak_equiv_into_univ_creates_exponentials F_weq
     C₁_univ E₀
     (weak_equiv_into_univ_creates_binproducts C₁_univ
        F_weq P₀))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
preserves_exponentials E₀
  (weak_equiv_into_univ_creates_exponentials F_weq
     C₁_univ E₀
     (weak_equiv_into_univ_creates_binproducts C₁_univ
        F_weq P₀))
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
preserves_exponential_objects' P₀
  (weak_equiv_into_univ_creates_binproducts C₁_univ
     F_weq P₀)
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) E₀

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
is_univalent C₁

    exact C₁_univ.
  Defined.

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
E₁: Exponentials P₁
preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)

  
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
E₁: Exponentials P₁
preserves_exponentials E₀ E₁
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq)

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
E₁: Exponentials P₁
preserves_exponential_objects' P₀ P₁
  (weak_equiv_preserves_binproducts F_weq) E₀

    
C₀, C₁: category
F: C₀ ⟶ C₁
F_weq: is_weak_equiv F
C₁_univ: is_univalent C₁
P₀: BinProducts C₀
E₀: Exponentials P₀
P₁: BinProducts C₁
E₁: Exponentials P₁
is_univalent C₁

    exact C₁_univ.
  Defined.

End WeakEquivalencesIntoUnivalentCatsPreservesExponentials.
